# Issue #951 — capture-before-delete baseline (E5, feature §7.1)
# Captured at RED time, before the five suites are deleted at GREEN.
# Full stdout of each suite over the current tree (HEAD: 012d890).
# Used by the RED suite (tests/test-issue-951-registry.sh) as the equivalence
# oracle: the runner must reproduce the same PASS/FAIL verdict set for the
# permanent (migrated) assertions of each suite (see migration map, feature §6).
# Cycle-scoped/diff-delta assertions in the 'retired' column are NOT part of
# the reproduction obligation (they are dropped/promoted/deferred per §6 disposition table).

===== SUITE: tests/test-issue-949-manifest-regen-doc.sh =====

  PASS: AC1-c3: GREEN section states the intersection/non-empty trigger predicate (intersects)
